items.raw_desc: Pingpongháló Acra Síť na stolní tenis - roztahovací RK2:Acra RK2 allows you to play table tennis anywhere. You can use it at home, at the cottage, on holiday and at the campsite. It is ideal for recreational players. It has an expanding mechanism that allows for quick and easy adjustment. Simply attach the clamps to the edge of the table and the net will automatically extend to the desired length. It is also easy to download after playing. When removed from the table, it folds down into a compact size, making it easy to carry and transport. The Acra RK2 net has a stable grip, which is ensured by robust clamps with non-slip coating. It is suitable for most standard tables. items.raw_desc: Injektortisztító Wynn's 51663 Diesel +Plus+ Treatment, 325 ml:Wynn's injector cleaner reliably cleans the fuel pump and injector nozzles, protects the entire fuel system against rust and corrosion and compensates for poor lubrication of low-sulfur fuel. Maintenance dosing: 1 bottle (325 ml) every 2,000 to 4,000 km, in case of heavy injector fouling, excessive black smoke, etc. Always add 1 bottle (325 ml) for the first three fill-ups, then maintenance dosage.
